---
ID: US-OLV-064
Title: Run Oliver step flows
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-22
Milestone: Add module chat flows and story backfill docs

As a operator
I want multi-step guided workflows inside OliverDock
So that structured actions can collect required data safely

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Actions whose id matches a registered flow start that flow.
- [ ] Flow steps can collect text, number, choice, or entity values.
- [ ] Required text/number steps reject blank values.
- [ ] Users can cancel an active flow.
- [ ] Flow run errors show Something went wrong.

Notes: Separate from older HR StepFlowRunner modal flows.
---
